dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of today's kitchen operations.
dashboard.heroSubtitleNoTasks: No prep tasks scheduled for today.

lowStockAlert.title: Low stock alert
lowStockAlert.description_one: {{count}} item at or below reorder threshold.
lowStockAlert.description_other: {{count}} items at or below reorder threshold.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Your team's culinary playbook.

scan.title: Scan Recipe with Claude AI
scan.hint: Upload a photo or PDF of a recipe — handwritten, printed, or from a book. Claude will extract the title, ingredients, instructions and allergens.
scan.upload: Click to upload an image or PDF
scan.error: Could not read the recipe. Try a clearer image.

import.title: Import Recipe with AI
import.textHint: Paste the full recipe text below — from a website, PDF, or anywhere. AI will extract the title, instructions, allergens and more.
import.urlHint: Paste a recipe URL and the app will fetch and extract the recipe automatically. Works best with recipe sites that use structured data.
import.error: Import failed. Try again or paste the text instead.

recipes.noMatch: No recipes match the current filters.

empty.title: No recipes yet
empty.description: Add your first recipe to start building the team's playbook.

versions.title: Version History
versions.empty: No saved versions yet. Versions are created automatically when you save edits.
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore this version? The current recipe will be overwritten.

form.title: Title
form.costOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use computed cost
form.costOverrideHint: Overrides the auto-computed cost from ingredients.

detail.makeInvalid: Enter a valid number greater than 0.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Track stock and reorder points.

empty.title: No inventory yet
empty.description: Add your first ingredient to start tracking stock.

inventory.noMatch: No items match the current filters.
inventory.restockPrompt:
Add stock to "{{name}}" (currently {{qty}} {{unit}}).
How much to add?
inventory.restockInvalid: Enter a valid number greater than 0.
inventory.locationsDescription: Locations help you organise stock by physical area (Walk-in Fridge, Dry Store, Bar…).

forecast.title: Inventory Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Items running low based on average daily consumption.
forecast.empty: All items have sufficient stock for 14+ days.

prep.title: Prep
prep.subtitle: Daily mise en place — checked off together.

empty.title: No tasks for this day
empty.description: Plan the mise en place for {{date}}.

prep.deleteAllConfirm: Delete {{count}} active task(s)? This cannot be undone.
prep.consumePrompt:
Mark "{{task}}" as done.
Consume ingredients from "{{recipe}}"?
Enter portions (or Cancel to skip):

workstations.title: Workstations
workstations.deleteConfirm: Delete workstation "{{name}}"? Tasks will be unassigned.

templates.hint: Save common prep lists and apply them to any date in one click.

fromMenu.title: Generate Prep from Menu
fromMenu.noRecipeItems: No menu items have a linked recipe.
fromMenu.smartBreakdownHint: Gemini breaks each recipe into per-station tasks with exact quantities
fromMenu.smartBreakdownNote: Tasks will be split by station and assigned to your {{count}} workstation(s).

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage your ingredient suppliers and their contacts.
suppliers.deleteConfirm: Delete supplier "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No suppliers yet
empty.description: Add your first supplier to track contacts and link inventory items.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Roles and active invites for your crew.
team.createMemberHint: The member can log in immediately with these credentials.
team.permissionsHint: Check the modules this member can access. The owner always has full access.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Kitchen performance at a glance.
analytics.noConsumptionData: No tracked movements with item costs set.
analytics.foodCostHint: Set a selling price on a recipe to see its food cost %.
analytics.noRecipesWithSellingPrice: No recipes with selling price set.
analytics.profitabilityAIHint: AI-powered pricing recommendations based on your current food costs and market trends.
analytics.aiNoPricedRecipes: No recipes with both cost and selling price set.
analytics.aiClickToAnalyse: Click "Analyse" to get AI pricing suggestions for your menu items.
analytics.inventoryForecastHint: Estimated days until stock runs out based on the last 30 days of consumption.
analytics.forecastNoData: No consumption data yet. Start using inventory to see forecasts.

haccp.title: HACCP Log
haccp.subtitle: Temperature checks and food safety compliance.

empty.title: No checks logged
empty.descriptionToday: Log your first temperature check for today.
empty.descriptionDate: Log your first temperature check for {{date}}.

blankForm.title: Print Blank Temperature Form
blankForm.instructionsText: Record temperature at each scheduled check time. If temperature is outside the target range, take corrective action immediately and document it. Shift supervisor to check and sign at end of day.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.empty: No reminders set. Add one to get alerted when a temperature check is due.
reminders.label: Reminder label
reminders.overdueWarning: {{count}} check(s) are overdue! Log a temperature reading.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Real-time messaging for your crew.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Say hi to your team!
chat.noTeamMembers: No other members yet. Invite from Team settings.

kds.title: Kitchen Display
kds.addTasksHint: Add tasks in the Prep page.

walkie.title: Walkie Feed
walkie.subtitle: Hold the button and speak — transcript is shared with your team.
walkie.noSpeechSupportHint: Use Chrome or Edge for voice input. Other browsers can read the feed.
walkie.empty: No voice messages yet. Hold the button to speak.
walkie.holdHint: Hold to talk · Release to send

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
profile.languageHint: Choose the language you want to use the app in. This is saved to your profile.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unsupported: Browser notifications are not supported in this browser.
notifications.enabledHint: You'll receive alerts for new chat messages and low-stock items.
notifications.deniedHint: Enable them in your browser settings to receive alerts.
notifications.description: Get notified about new chat messages and low-stock items.
notifications.pushDescription: Get notified even when the app is closed.
notifications.pushActiveHint: You'll receive push notifications in the background.
notifications.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Start your kitchen setup.
signup.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
signup.accountCreated: Account created. Check your inbox to confirm, then sign in.

onboarding.title: Set up your kitchen
onboarding.subtitle: Create a team or join with an invite.
onboarding.inviteTokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from your invite link
onboarding.inviteTokenHint: It looks like a UUID (e.g. c1e2…-…-…)

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This route doesn't exist in the kitchen.

shifts.title: Shifts
shifts.subtitle: Weekly schedule for your kitchen team.

form.timeRequired: Start and end time are required
form.timeOrder: End time must be after start time

waste.title: Waste Log
waste.subtitle: Track food waste and losses to reduce costs.

empty.title: No waste logged this month
empty.description: Track discarded or spoiled food to monitor waste cost.

menus.title: Menus
menus.subtitle: Digital menus for your restaurant.

empty.title: No menus yet
empty.description: Create your first menu to share with guests.

menus.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? All sections and items will be removed.

form.name: Menu name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description visible on the digital menu…

detail.deleteSectionConfirm: Delete section "{{name}}"? All items in it will be removed.
detail.prepNoRecipes: No items with linked recipes found.
detail.prepSkipExisting: Skip if task already exists for this date
detail.qrHint: Print this and place it on tables so guests can scan it.

cost.noCostData: No linked recipes with cost data found.
cost.noCostHint: Link recipes to menu items and set ingredient costs to see analysis.

shopping.noRecipes: No menu items have linked recipes.
shopping.noIngredients: No ingredient data found for linked recipes.

print.footerPlaceholder: e.g. Prices include VAT · All rights reserved

labels.logoHint: Defaults to the menu logo. Upload a different one to override only for these labels.
labels.allergenLangHint: Language shown next to each allergen icon on the labels.
labels.noItemsInMenu: This menu has no items to print labels for.

productionSheet.title: Production Sheet
productionSheet.noTasks: No prep tasks for this date
productionSheet.noTasksHint: Use "Generate Prep" to create tasks linked to this menu

serviceBoard.title: Service Board
serviceBoard.hint: Tap an item to toggle availability. Changes save instantly.

aiGenerator.title: AI Menu Generator
aiGenerator.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Mediterranean summer menu for a beach restaurant, focus on seafood and fresh vegetables, mid-range pricing

public.notFoundHint: This menu may have been deactivated or the link is invalid.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Manage orders to your suppliers.
purchaseOrders.noItems: No items yet. Add items below.
purchaseOrders.invoiceError: Could not read invoice. Try a clearer image.
purchaseOrders.legendUpdate: Green — item exists in inventory, quantity will be added
purchaseOrders.legendCreate: Amber — new item, will be created in inventory

empty.title: No purchase orders yet
empty.description: Create orders to send to your suppliers.

timeclock.title: Timeclock
timeclock.subtitle: Track staff clock-in and clock-out times.
timeclock.tapToClockIn: Tap to clock in and start tracking your shift.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Manage table bookings from guests.
reservations.selectHint: Select a reservation to see details

staffPerf.title: Staff Performance
staffPerf.subtitle: Hours worked, punctuality and overtime per team member, based on timeclock and shift data.

empty.title: No timeclock data yet
empty.description: Team members need to clock in and out to see performance metrics.

pl.title: Profit & Loss
pl.subtitle: Revenue vs costs overview. Revenue from completed online orders, costs from received purchase orders and waste.
pl.weeklyTrendHint: Green = revenue · Red = total costs · Number = gross profit for that week

empty.title: No data yet
empty.description: Complete online orders and receive purchase orders to see your P&L.

priceTracking.title: Price Tracker
priceTracking.subtitle: Track ingredient & product prices across invoices. Alerts when price increases exceed 10%.
priceTracking.alertBanner: {{count}} item(s) increased in price by more than {{pct}}% since last invoice.

empty.title: No price data yet
empty.description: Upload invoices with unit prices to start tracking price changes over time.

menuEng.title: Menu Engineering
menuEng.subtitle: Classify your dishes by popularity and margin — last 30 days of completed orders.
menuEng.plowhorseHint: Popular but thin margin. Consider raising price or reducing cost.
menuEng.puzzleHint: Good margin but needs more visibility. Feature it more.
menuEng.dogHint: Low sales and low margin. Consider removing from menu.

empty.title: No sales data yet
empty.description: Complete some online orders to see menu engineering analysis.

journal.title: Chef's Journal
journal.subtitle: Private notes, ideas, and reflections from your kitchen.

empty.title: No journal entries yet
empty.description: Start writing your kitchen notes, recipe ideas, and daily reflections.

journal.tagsHint: Separate tags with spaces. Use # prefix (e.g. #ideas #service).

pulse.title: Kitchen Pulse
pulse.subtitle: Anonymous weekly team morale and workload check-in.
pulse.alreadySubmitted: You've already submitted this week's check-in.
pulse.notePlaceholder: Anything you'd like management to know…
pulse.noHistory: No pulse data yet. Be the first to submit this week.
pulse.anonymous: All responses are anonymous — no names are stored.

reports.title: Email Reports
reports.description: Send a weekly kitchen summary to your email — food cost, waste, low stock, prep rate and HACCP compliance.
reports.noRecipients: Add at least one email address.
reports.scheduleHint: For automatic weekly delivery, set up a scheduled trigger in your Supabase dashboard → Edge Functions → weekly-report → Schedule.

copilot.title: Chef Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Your AI kitchen assistant — ask anything about your recipes, stock, or menu.
copilot.welcome: Hi! I'm Chef Copilot. I have access to your recipes, inventory, and waste data. Ask me anything — recipe suggestions, cost analysis, substitutions, or kitchen advice.
copilot.placeholder: Ask anything… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
copilot.disclaimer: AI responses may be inaccurate. Always verify critical information.
copilot.starter1: Which of my recipes has the highest food cost %?
copilot.starter2: What can I cook tonight with what's in stock?
copilot.starter3: Suggest a vegan variation of one of my main courses.
copilot.starter4: Which items are low in stock and should I reorder?

culinaryTools.title: Kitchen Reference Tools
culinaryTools.subtitle: Unit converter, recipe scaling, ingredient substitutions, and temperature guides.

scale.name: Ingredient name
scale.tip: Enter your ingredients and set original / target servings — amounts scale automatically.

glossary.title: Culinary Glossary
glossary.subtitle: 55+ professional culinary terms with definitions and Greek translations.

techniques.title: Technique Library
techniques.subtitle: Step-by-step professional kitchen techniques with tips and difficulty levels.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to get the most out of ChefSuite.
help.gettingStartedDesc: Complete these steps to set up your kitchen operations.
help.featuresDesc: Explore what each module can do for your kitchen.
help.faqDesc: Answers to the most common questions.
help.shortcutsDesc: Speed up your workflow with these shortcuts.
help.tip: Tip: You can always come back here from the sidebar.
help.completed: All set! Your kitchen is ready.

pos.title: POS Integration
pos.subtitle: Connect your Viva Wallet or Square terminal — transactions flow into P&L automatically.
pos.step1: Choose your POS provider and save the settings.
pos.step2: Copy the webhook URL and paste it into your Viva Wallet or Square dashboard.
pos.step3: Every completed payment appears automatically in P&L and Analytics.
pos.webhookHint: Paste this URL in your POS provider's webhook settings.
pos.tokenHint: Keep this URL private — it's your unique authentication token.
pos.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate the webhook URL? The old URL will stop working immediately.
pos.squareSecretHint: Found in Square Developer Dashboard → Webhooks → your endpoint → Signature key.
pos.vivaSecretHint: Optional extra security. Set the same value in Viva Wallet → Webhooks → Webhook Key.
pos.enableHint: Disable temporarily without deleting your settings.

ingredients.title: Ingredients Encyclopedia
ingredients.subtitle: Spices, herbs, aromatic cheeses, oils & vinegars — origin, flavour, uses and chef tips.

handover.title: Handover Notes
handover.subtitle: Communication between shifts
handover.emptyHint: Create a note to hand over important information to the next shift.

kitchenLabels.title: Kitchen Labels
kitchenLabels.subtitle: Print labels for your dishes
kitchenLabels.logoHint: Upload a logo to print on each label
kitchenLabels.selectRecipesHint: Select recipes to print labels for
kitchenLabels.previewEmpty: Select recipes to see a preview

stocktake.title: Stocktake
stocktake.subtitle: Physical count — update your actual stock levels

costing.title: Food Costing
costing.subtitle: Manage ingredient costs and recipe profitability
